reviews.feedback: Still no error taxonomy, no codes, leaks internals. Slightly better than iteration 1 — has a basic error middleware now but format is inconsistent.
When wrapping external API errors, include the upstream service name (e.g., 'inventory-api') and the HTTP status code from the failed response in the error details.
Same issues as iteration 1. Swallowed exceptions, no structured logging.
Client handling section needs to cover ALL error categories with specific guidance: retry logic for 429, re-authenticate for 401, show field errors for 400, etc.
No improvement from iteration 1. Still no schema, no codes, no field-level details.
